logline: An adult psychological crime-noir anime set in a hyper-corrupt modern metropolis ruled by three corporate syndicates. The covert Executive Tier (0–10) measures credit, influence, legal immunity, and access to private enforcers. Elias Venn, a Tier-4 forensic accountant and fixer for syndicate executives, discovers that an unseen operator is blackmailing and assassinating high-tier figures with their concealed affairs and financial crimes. To survive, he enters a dangerous, non-explicit affair with Mara Vale, the spouse of a Tier-9 syndicate boss and a hidden architect of the blackmail ring. Every episode is a chess match of leverage, betrayal, political power, and intimate emotional stakes, where advancement always costs someone their freedom. Grounded, tense, morally grey, and mature; use sensual tension without explicit sexual content.
